---
title: "campaign_updater.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/games/odin_protocol/engine/campaign_updater.py"
loc: 70
complexity: 9
logic_score: 3.07
style_score: 3.65
intel_score: 5.97
overall_score: 4.89
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating CampaignUpdater, __init__. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.persistence](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.persistence)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.logic](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.logic)
- [sys](file://sys)

### Exports
- `CampaignUpdater`
- `__init__`
- `update_campaign`
- `_get_new_traces`
